---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve IRIS 365
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 125, Safari 17]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 20.14.0]
- Module affected: [e.g., Transit, Canteen, Gate, Library]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Include relevant API responses, console errors, or network logs if applicable.
